classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'IB-001 — Investigator Brochure' in the title and describes physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, clinical studies, and benefit-risk assessment of the investigational drug BRC-471 (Lumitanib).

indication: EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC following progression on osimertinib
summary: This is the initial Investigator Brochure (Edition 1) for BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an orally bioavailable dual EGFR/HER2 inhibitor under development for EGFR-mutant advanced NSCLC. It summarizes physicochemical properties, preclinical pharmacology, Phase I clinical data establishing RP2D of 200 mg BID with 22% ORR and manageable safety profile, and benefit-risk assessment to support ongoing clinical investigation.
